sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Iowans may see new air travel options with Allegiant/Sun Country merger
feed.summary: Allegiant Airlines is acquiring Sun Country Airlines in a $1.5 billion deal, with the merger expected to finalize in the latter half of the year. While the combined entity will operate under the Allegiant name, the acquisition aims to expand Allegiant's routes and fleet. This could potentially offer new air travel options for Iowans, though an analyst notes Sun Country's role as a competitor to larger airlines might change as Allegiant focuses on smaller cities.

feed.title: How Regency Centers Corporation (REG) Affects Rotational Strategy Timing
feed.summary: Regency Centers Corporation (REG) shows a full alignment in neutral sentiment across all time horizons, suggesting a wait-and-see approach for investors. The AI analysis by Stock Traders Daily indicates that resistance is being tested, and if it holds, support is expected next. The report details various trading strategies—position, momentum breakout, and risk hedging—with entry, target, and stop-loss levels, alongside multi-timeframe signal analysis and an exceptional risk-reward short setup.

feed.title: Henry Schein Taps Former Thermo Fisher Exec as New CEO
feed.summary: Henry Schein, a major healthcare solutions distributor, has appointed Frederick M. Lowery as its new CEO, effective March 2. Lowery, previously an Executive Vice President at Thermo Fisher Scientific, will succeed Stanley M. Bergman, who is stepping down after 35 years but will remain Chairman of the Board. Lowery's extensive experience in healthcare distribution and product businesses aligns with Henry Schein's strategic goals for its next growth phase.

feed.title: Alliant Energy Corporation (NASDAQ:LNT) Raises Dividend to $0.54 Per Share
feed.summary: Alliant Energy Corporation (NASDAQ:LNT) announced an increase in its quarterly dividend to $0.535 per share, marking a 5.4% rise from its previous dividend. This dividend, payable on February 17th to shareholders of record on January 30th, continues a 22-year streak of annual increases. The utility company maintains a solid dividend payout ratio of 59.0%, with analysts projecting strong EPS coverage for the annual dividend.

feed.title: The Bull Case For Abbott Laboratories (ABT) Could Change Following Libre Assist AI Launch In Diabetes Care
feed.summary: Abbott Laboratories recently launched Libre Assist, an AI-powered feature in its Libre app, designed to help diabetes patients predict and monitor glucose levels after meals. This innovation could enhance user engagement with Abbott's FreeStyle Libre ecosystem and is expected to be a key factor in the company's investment narrative, especially with upcoming Q4 2025 earnings. However, investors are also considering potential challenges from continuous glucose monitoring competition and reimbursement pressures.

feed.title: Is Realty Income (O) Pricing Make Sense After Recent Share Price Gains?
feed.summary: This article analyzes Realty Income's (O) share price through two valuation methods: Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) and Price-to-Earnings (P/E) ratio. The DCF analysis suggests the stock is significantly undervalued by 38.4%, while the P/E ratio indicates it is overvalued compared to industry averages and Simply Wall St's proprietary "Fair Ratio." The article also introduces "Narratives" as a way for investors to customize their valuation assumptions.

feed.title: Is ServiceNow (NOW) Attractive After Recent Share Price Pullback And DCF Valuation Gap
feed.summary: ServiceNow (NOW) has experienced a significant share price pullback, raising questions about its current valuation. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock is undervalued by 30.3% at US$138.19, with an intrinsic value of US$198.16. However, its Price-to-Earnings (P/E) ratio of 82.82x is higher than the industry average, indicating it might be overvalued by this metric, leading to conflicting valuation signals for investors.

feed.title: Citigroup Inc. to Issue Quarterly Dividend of $0.60 (NYSE:C)
feed.summary: Citigroup Inc. has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.60 per share, payable on February 27th to shareholders of record on February 2nd. This dividend represents an annualized yield of 2.1% and is well covered by earnings, with a payout ratio of 25.6%. The article also discusses recent stock performance, upcoming Q4 earnings, planned job cuts, pending legal exposure, and the potential impact of a proposed 10% cap on credit card interest rates.

feed.title: Village Farms' Cost Discipline Pays Off: Can Margins Keep Improving?
feed.summary: Village Farms International (VFF) demonstrated strong third-quarter 2025 performance, with consolidated adjusted EBITDA reaching $20.7 million, or 31% of sales, due to sustained cost discipline and operational efficiency. The Canadian cannabis business significantly improved its gross margin to 56% from 26% year-over-year, driven by increased productivity and lower production costs. The company's focus on efficiency and cost control has led to its shares soaring 383.3% in the past year, outperforming industry averages.

feed.title: The Truth About Equinix Inc.: Is This ‘Boring’ Stock Actually a Quiet Flex?
feed.summary: This article analyzes Equinix Inc. (EQIX), a data center and interconnection REIT, evaluating whether this "boring" but crucial digital infrastructure stock is a good investment. It delves into the company's business model, its role in supporting cloud and AI technologies, valuation compared to competitors like Digital Realty, and potential risks and rewards for long-term investors. The verdict suggests it's a solid "cop" for those seeking long-term exposure to the internet's backbone, despite not being a quick-flip stock.

feed.title: News Corp Activates US$2 Billion Share Repurchase of Nasdaq-Listed Stock
feed.summary: News Corp is initiating a share buy-back program for its Nasdaq-listed Class A and B common stock, excluding ASX CDIs. The company has authorization for up to US$2 billion in repurchases under programs from 2021 and 2025. This strategic move aims to optimize capital, enhance shareholder value, and signal confidence in the company's valuation.

feed.title: Teradyne to Announce Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results
feed.summary: Teradyne, Inc. will release its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year 2025 on Monday, February 2, 2026, after market close. A conference call for investors and management's business outlook will follow on Tuesday, February 3, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET. Interested parties can access the webcast and presentation materials on the company's investor relations website.

feed.title: Rockwell Automation 2025 Sustainability Report Reflects Continued Commitment to Build a More Resilient, Agile, and Sustainable Future
feed.summary: Rockwell Automation has published its 2025 Sustainability Report, detailing its commitment to integrating technology and manufacturing for a more sustainable future. The report focuses on environmental, social, and governance aspects, aiming to help customers achieve their sustainability goals, improve Rockwell's own operations, and invest in communities. Key actions include setting science-based targets for emissions, climate-proofing supply chains, and scaling digital solutions.

feed.title: Canadian consumer group seeks to break up Live Nation using changes to competition rules
feed.summary: A Canadian consumer advocacy group is looking to break up Live Nation Entertainment using new provisions in the Competition Act that allow private entities to challenge anti-competitive conduct. The Consumers Council of Canada has applied to the Canadian Competition Tribunal to sue Ticketmaster and Live Nation, citing a history of alleged antitrust issues and their control over the live music industry. This case could set a significant precedent as it allows consumers to seek compensation for alleged anti-competitive practices, which was not previously possible.

feed.title: Ford and Carhartt announce multi-year partnership, including special edition truck
feed.summary: Ford Motor Company and Carhartt have announced a multi-year partnership focused on workforce development, community building, and creating products for skilled trades. The collaboration includes a new 2027 Super Duty Carhartt edition truck and plans to bring ToolBank USA to Detroit, supported by Ford's donation of an F-150. Additionally, the partnership will outfit Ford Auto Tech Scholars in customized Carhartt apparel and provide new workwear for Ford dealership technicians.

feed.title: BofA Again Moves To Ax Epstein-Related Trafficking Claims
feed.summary: Bank of America has once again asked a New York federal judge to dismiss an amended class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that BofA enabled Jeffrey Epstein's sex-trafficking operation. BofA argues that the plaintiffs' latest filing still fails to state a claim under the Trafficking Victim Protection Act and offers no new substantive information.

feed.title: Chevron stock edges higher after-hours as Venezuela crude shift puts CVX in focus
feed.summary: Chevron (CVX) shares rose after-hours due to plans to process Venezuelan crude at its U.S. refineries, following shifts in U.S. policy and increased Venezuelan oil production. The news comes amidst wider oil market fluctuations driven by geopolitical tensions in Iran and ongoing discussions regarding U.S. majors' involvement in Venezuelan deals and Chevron's potential bid for Lukoil assets. Investors are now focused on timelines for Venezuelan crude deliveries and Chevron's upcoming Q4 earnings call.

feed.title: Rockwell Automation 2025 Sustainability Report Reflects Continued Commitment to Build a More Resilient, Agile, and Sustainable Future
feed.summary: Rockwell Automation Inc. has released its 2025 Sustainability Report, demonstrating its dedication to a more sustainable future by integrating technology and manufacturing. The report details how Rockwell's strategy, focused on Environment, Social, and Governance, helps industrial customers reduce energy use, minimize waste, and lower emissions while enhancing productivity. This commitment aims to build a more resilient business and create long-term value, with sustainability viewed as a key growth strategy.

feed.title: Applied Materials (AMAT) stock slips after hours despite Susquehanna upgrade and new $325 target
feed.summary: Applied Materials (AMAT) stock slipped 0.8% after hours to $304.87, despite Susquehanna upgrading it to "Positive" with a new $400 price target, and Bernstein raising its target to $325. The market's subdued reaction suggests investors are not automatically boosting shares based on upgrades in the semiconductor equipment sector. Key factors influencing the stock include wafer fab equipment spending, U.S. export controls on China, and upcoming earnings expected around February 12th.

feed.title: Sequans Communications (NYSE:SQNS) Major Shareholder Daniel Asher Buys 27,032 Shares
feed.summary: Major shareholder Daniel Asher bought 27,032 shares of Sequans Communications (NYSE:SQNS) on January 9th, valued at $135,160, increasing his total stake to 1,220,435 shares. This transaction, alongside other recent purchases on January 7th and 12th, highlights insider confidence in the company. Sequans Communications, a fabless semiconductor company specializing in cellular IoT and broadband connectivity, currently holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average price target of $10.83.

feed.title: Daniel Asher Acquires 6,800 Shares of Sequans Communications (NYSE:SQNS) Stock
feed.summary: Major shareholder Daniel Asher recently acquired 6,800 shares of Sequans Communications (NYSE:SQNS) stock on January 12th for $5.36 per share, increasing his total holdings to 1,227,235 shares. This purchase is part of a series of recent acquisitions by Asher in early January. Sequans Communications, a fabless semiconductor company specializing in cellular IoT and broadband connectivity, currently holds a "Moderate Buy" analyst rating with an average price target of $10.83.

feed.title: TVTX ALERT: Investigation Launched into Travere
feed.summary: Robbins Geller Rudman & Dowd LLP has initiated an investigation into Travere Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: TVTX) for potential violations of U.S. federal securities laws. The law firm is looking into whether Travere and its executives made false or misleading statements regarding the company's business and operations. Investors who have suffered losses are encouraged to contact Robbins Geller for more information.

feed.title: Phoenix Education Partners, Inc. Q1 Profit Decreases, But Beats Estimates
feed.summary: Phoenix Education Partners, Inc. (PXED) reported a decrease in Q1 profit compared to the previous year, with earnings totaling $15.45 million or $0.40 per share, down from $46.42 million or $1.23 per share. However, the company's adjusted earnings of $1.38 per share for the period beat analysts' estimates of $1.28 per share. Revenue for the quarter rose by 2.9% to $262.03 million, and it provided a full-year revenue guidance of $1.025 billion-$1.035 billion.

feed.title: Ford partners with Carhartt to launch a tool bank and a special F-150
feed.summary: Ford and Carhartt have announced a multiyear strategic partnership to support skilled trades, focusing on workforce development, community building, and providing tools. The collaboration will include a new co-branded 2027 Super Duty Carhartt pickup and the opening of a ToolBank USA in Detroit. This initiative aims to address shortages in skilled professions by offering training, scholarships, and tools to attract new talent to essential industries like manufacturing and construction.

feed.title: Costco stock barely moves after-hours as insider sale hits the tape ahead of key dates
feed.summary: Costco's shares saw minimal movement after an executive sold 1,500 shares. Investors are looking ahead to the shareholder meeting on January 15th and a sales update in early February for future market catalysts. The insider sale provides a minor signal amidst broader market turbulence and upcoming key company events.

feed.title: Ford Teams With Carhartt And Teases A Special Edition Super Duty
feed.summary: Ford and Carhartt have announced a partnership that will include workforce development, community initiatives, and product collaboration, kicking off with a special edition Super Duty truck. This 2027 model Super Duty Carhartt Edition will blend Ford's capability with Carhartt's durable workwear aesthetic, featuring design elements inspired by Carhartt's downtown Detroit store. The collaboration also includes a uniform program for Ford dealership technicians, providing Carhartt workwear.

feed.title: Janet Lee Sells 250 Shares of Synopsys (NASDAQ:SNPS) Stock
feed.summary: Synopsys director Janet Lee recently sold 250 shares of the company's stock on January 12th for $132,500, reducing her direct holdings by 2.05%. This follows another sale of 250 shares on January 7th. Synopsys stock traded down 4.1% to $511.80, and the company reported strong quarterly earnings, beating estimates with $2.90 EPS and 37.8% revenue growth.

feed.title: Ford's quest to dominate the off-road market expands with Bronco RTR
feed.summary: Ford is expanding its presence in the booming off-road market with the introduction of the Bronco RTR, a new mid-tier performance vehicle expected in early 2027. This move follows Ford's successful strategy initiated with the F-150 Raptor in 2010, which led the company to capture 20% of off-road performance sales by 2025. The Bronco RTR aims to attract a younger demographic with its affordability and direct-from-factory availability, further solidifying Ford's position as a leader in the lucrative off-road segment.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Janet Lee Sells 250 Shares of Synopsys Inc (SNPS)
feed.summary: Janet Lee, General Counsel & Corporate Secretary at Synopsys Inc (SNPS), sold 250 shares of the company on January 12, 2026, bringing her total ownership to 11,959 shares. Over the past year, Lee has sold 500 shares in total, contributing to a pattern of 1 insider buy and 11 insider sells for Synopsys. Despite the insider selling, SNPS is considered modestly undervalued with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 0.86, trading at $530 against a GF Value of $613.26.

feed.title: Newmont Sets Date for Fourth-Quarter and Full-Year 2025 Results Release and Call
feed.summary: Newmont Corporation (AU:NEM) will release its fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 financial results on February 19, 2026, in the U.S. (February 20 AEDT). This will be followed by a conference call and webcast for investors and analysts, providing stakeholders an opportunity to assess the company's performance and strategic progress. A recent analyst rating for Newmont stock is a Buy with an A$177.00 price target.

feed.title: BNY Mellon (BK) Earnings Call Signals Higher Ambitions
feed.summary: BNY Mellon (BK) reported record revenue and net income for 2025, driven by strong performance in Securities Services and Markets & Wealth Services, with a focus on operating leverage and capital returns. While Investment & Wealth Management saw outflows and Pershing faced some fee pressure, the company raised its medium-term financial targets and emphasized progress in AI and platform initiatives. Management expressed confidence in sustaining profitable growth, balancing a robust core business with strategic investments and capital distribution.

feed.title: Seagate Technology to Report Fiscal Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results on January 27, 2026
feed.summary: Seagate Technology Holdings plc will announce its fiscal second quarter 2026 financial results after the US market closes on Tuesday, January 27, 2026. An investment community conference call will follow at 2:00 PM PT / 5:00 PM ET to discuss these results. A live audio webcast of the call will be available on Seagate’s Investor Relations website.

feed.title: Rockwell Automation 2025 Sustainability Report Reflects Continued Commitment to Build a More Resilient, Agile, and Sustainable Future - PR Newswire APAC
feed.summary: Rockwell Automation published its 2025 Sustainability Report, highlighting its commitment to sustainability through technology and manufacturing. The report focuses on environmental, social, and governance areas, aiming to help customers achieve their sustainability goals while making its own operations more resilient and responsible. Rockwell Automation emphasizes that sustainability is a growth strategy, driving long-term value for stakeholders.

feed.title: Forged in Detroit: Ford and Carhartt Partner to Strengthen Essential Economy
feed.summary: Ford and Carhartt, both iconic American brands, have partnered to support the essential economy, focusing on skilled trades and those who work in demanding jobs. This collaboration highlights their shared values of durability, hard work, and community support. The initiative emphasizes strengthening industries vital to the nation's infrastructure and everyday functioning.

feed.title: Public Storage Stock: Steady Gains, Quiet Newsflow, And A Market Looking For Direction
feed.summary: Public Storage stock has shown steady upward momentum, reflecting a resilient profile despite market uncertainties and a quiet newsflow. The stock's performance over the past year highlights a balanced return for income-oriented investors, combining sturdy yield with steady appreciation. Analysts maintain a largely constructive but cautious view, positioning Public Storage as a quality REIT with moderate growth potential.

feed.title: Rio Tinto engages three banks to advise on potential Glencore acquisition, source says
feed.summary: Rio Tinto has hired JPMorgan, Evercore, and Macquarie to advise on a potential acquisition of Glencore, a deal that could create the world's largest miner valued at over $200 billion. The transaction reflects the ongoing consolidation in the mining industry as companies seek to secure metals essential for the energy transition and AI. While Rio Tinto has engaged advisers, Glencore has not yet formally retained its own, and previous merger discussions between the two giants in 2014 and late 2024 did not result in an agreement.

feed.title: Stop the Privatization of the Tennessee Valley Authority (TVA)
feed.summary: The IAM Union is urging its members and the public to oppose renewed efforts to privatize the Tennessee Valley Authority (TVA), a public institution providing affordable energy and union jobs. The union warns that privatization would lead to higher electricity rates, loss of union jobs, and reduced public accountability. They are calling on people to contact their Senators and Representatives to prevent the sale of TVA.

feed.title: How Global X Mlp & Energy Infrastructure Etf (MLPX) Affects Rotational Strategy Timing
feed.summary: This article analyzes the Global X MLP & Energy Infrastructure ETF (MLPX) using AI models to provide trading strategies. It highlights a neutral sentiment across all time horizons, suggesting sideways action, and identifies specific support and resistance levels. The analysis offers strategies for position trading, momentum breakouts, and risk hedging, emphasizing a wait-and-see approach due to a support test.

feed.title: (MITK) Movement Within Algorithmic Entry Frameworks
feed.summary: Stock Traders Daily provided an algorithmic analysis for Mitek Systems Inc. (MITK), highlighting a near-term strong sentiment with a neutral mid and long-term outlook. The analysis identified an exceptional short setup targeting 10.1% downside with minimal risk and outlined specific position, momentum, and risk hedging trading strategies based on AI models. It also offered multi-timeframe signal analysis, including support and resistance levels.

feed.title: The Truth About Intuit Inc.: Is This ‘Boring’ Stock Actually a Quiet Money Machine?
feed.summary: Intuit Inc. (INTU) is presented as a "quiet money machine" despite its seemingly "boring" products like TurboTax and QuickBooks, which are essential for personal finance and small businesses. The article highlights Intuit's strong financial performance, sticky ecosystem, and strategic growth into a comprehensive financial operating system, positioning it as a robust long-term investment. While acknowledging its premium valuation and regulatory scrutiny as potential risks, the analysis ultimately suggests Intuit is a "cop" for investors seeking stable, profitable software leaders.

feed.title: President Trump visits Ford pickup truck factory during Michigan trip
authors: AFP Via Getty Images; Evelyn Hockstein
feed.summary: President Donald Trump visited Michigan to tour the Ford River Rouge Complex in Dearborn and later address the Detroit Economic Club. The article showcases various photos of Trump interacting with Ford executives, including CEO Jim Farley and executive chairman Bill Ford, during his tour of the F-150 production facility. This visit highlights Trump's engagement with the automotive industry during his trip.

feed.title: A Look At Bank of New York Mellon Corporation’s Valuation After Its Earnings Beat And New Medium Term Targets
feed.summary: Bank of New York Mellon (BK) reported strong Q4 2025 results, exceeding revenue and profit consensus, and announced new medium-term targets and a dividend. While a narrative fair value suggests the stock is 3.7% undervalued at $127.67, Simply Wall St's DCF model indicates it's trading above its fair value estimate of $100.10. The article encourages investors to analyze the assumptions behind these valuations and offers tools to build custom narratives.

feed.title: Is It Too Late To Consider Applied Materials (AMAT) After Its Strong Multi‑Year Rally?
feed.summary: This article analyzes whether Applied Materials (AMAT) is still a good investment after its significant multi-year rally, using two valuation approaches. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock is 118.2% overvalued, with an intrinsic value of US$139.71 per share compared to its market price of US$304.87. Additionally, its Price-to-Earnings (P/E) ratio of 34.54x is slightly above Simply Wall St's Fair Ratio of 31.77x, also indicating it might be overvalued.

feed.title: Congressmen Sell Netflix Stock Ahead Of NFL Games, 'Stranger Things' Finale: Will They Miss Profits?
feed.summary: Two members of Congress, Rep. Gil Cisneros and Rep. Jonathan Jackson, sold their Netflix (NASDAQ: NFLX) stock in December, potentially missing out on significant gains. Their sales occurred before major catalysts like record-setting NFL games aired on Netflix and the release of the final parts of "Stranger Things" season five. Analysts are anticipating a strong fourth-quarter earnings report for Netflix, partly due to these events, and historically, January has been a favorable month for Netflix stock performance.

feed.title: International Business Machines (NYSE:IBM) Stock Price Down 3% - What's Next?
feed.summary: International Business Machines (NYSE:IBM) shares dropped 3% during mid-day trading on Tuesday, with increased trading volume. Despite the dip, Wall Street sentiment remains largely positive, with several firms raising price targets and a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating. Corporate catalysts include an expanded edge AI offering and a cleared antitrust hurdle for a major acquisition, though analyst views on IBM's strategic direction are mixed.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: Phoenix Education Partners Q1 2026 sees revenue rise
feed.summary: Phoenix Education Partners reported a 2.9% increase in Q1 FY2026 net revenue to $262 million and an adjusted EPS of $1.38, exceeding analyst expectations. The company's stock rose 1.49% in aftermarket trading, driven by these positive results and solid enrollment growth of 4.1%. Phoenix Education Partners also announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.21 per share and reiterated its full-year guidance, emphasizing its strategic focus on AI integration and student success.

feed.title: Phoenix Education Partners I (NYSE:PXED) Reports Mixed Q1 Results with Adjusted EPS Beat
feed.summary: Phoenix Education Partners I (NYSE:PXED) reported mixed Q1 results for the fiscal quarter ended November 30, 2025, with revenue slightly below estimates but adjusted EPS exceeding expectations. The company's GAAP earnings were impacted by IPO-related costs, leading to a significant year-over-year decline, though adjusted EBITDA and EPS showed growth. Investors reacted positively in after-hours trading, focusing on the adjusted earnings beat and strong liquidity.

feed.title: Polestar Automotive Holding UK (NASDAQ:PSNY) Trading Up 7.4% - Time to Buy?
feed.summary: Polestar Automotive Holding UK (NASDAQ:PSNY) saw its shares increase by 7.4% on Tuesday, trading at $21.24 on light volume. Despite this recent uptick, analyst sentiment remains negative, with an "Sell" average rating based on one Hold and two Sell ratings, including downgrades. The company has a market capitalization of $1.47 billion, a negative P/E, and low institutional ownership, though some funds recently increased their stakes.

feed.title: Rithm Capital (RITM) Launches $250M Preferred Stock Offering
feed.summary: Rithm Capital Corp. (RITM) has announced an underwritten public offering of 10 million shares of 8.750% Series F Fixed-Rate Reset Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock, aiming to raise roughly $250 million. The REIT, which focuses on real estate and financial services, will use the proceeds for investments and general corporate purposes. While the company exhibits strong net margins, it faces challenges with modest revenue growth and high leverage.

feed.title: Chinese firm Sinovac to supply vaccine to Chile ahead of flu season
feed.summary: Chinese biopharmaceutical firm Sinovac Biotech will supply 8.65 million doses of its influenza vaccine to the Chilean government for approximately US$14.7 million. This marks the second consecutive year Sinovac has provided the vaccine to Chile. The doses are expected in January, with an earlier-than-usual immunization campaign set for March to combat the H3N2 strain of influenza A circulating globally.
